heading: Crime victims legal assistance grants
label: 20107 Crime victims legal assistance grants
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 10603d of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director may make grants as provided in to State, tribal, and local prosecutors’ offices, law enforcement agencies, courts, jails, and correctional institutions, and to qualified public and private entities, to develop, establish, and maintain programs for the enforcement of crime victims’ rights as provided in law.section 20103(c)(1)(A) of this title

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: Grant amounts under this section may not be used to bring a cause of action for damages.

children.heading: False Claims Act
children.label: c False Claims Act
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, amounts collected pursuant to sections 3729 through 3731 of title 31 (commonly known as the “False Claims Act”) may be used for grants under this section, subject to appropriation.
